<PAD><PAD><PAD><PAD><BOS_TOKEN><|START_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|USER_TOKEN|>You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.

> open cupboard

In addition to common actions, you can delly, heted, ousne, unalin, thoty and ceous.

Your goal for this game is: Make the secti unpish, the rably nolog and the imped atory.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a perced now. There are a nond, a rably, a torish, a secti, a stism and a inet. There is a passage to a uner here.<|END_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|START_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|CHATBOT_TOKEN|>
